paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% change from the prior close and a -36.32% change over a 20-session window. The price quote is as of July 17, 2026.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's CEO departure, governance concerns, and a $375 million convertibles deal. There have been no new news articles in the last 24 hours. The news sources include Stocktwits, simplywall.st, and Yahoo Finance, with headlines such as "Why Did FRMI Stock Tumble More Than 28% In After-Hours Trading Today?" and "Fermi Has Zero Revenue And A $486M Loss – So Why Is Retail Still Bullish On FRMI Stock?".

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records.
